summary: ROUND 2 Comprehensive Audit Complete: Verified 3 recent fixes (2/3 passed), audited Finance pages (all working), POS/Sales Portal, CRM 360, Returns/Special Orders, Warehouse WMS tabs, and empty-data pages. Found CRITICAL status filter spacing bug on Returns & Special Orders pages.

backend_issues.notes: Backend not tested in this round (frontend-only testing as requested). All backend APIs appear functional based on frontend data loading.

ui_bugs.issue: Entity switcher 'Semua Entitas' appears 4 times instead of once
ui_bugs.description: FIX 2 FAILED: The entity switcher dropdown showing 'Semua Entitas' is duplicated 4 times on the page. Should appear only ONCE in the TopBar.

ui_bugs.issue: Status filter tabs run together without spacing
ui_bugs.description: Status filter buttons (Semua, Draft, Menunggu, Approved, Ditolak) have no spacing/gap between them, making them appear as one continuous block. Buttons need proper gap/margin.
ui_bugs.technical_note: Buttons have marginRight/marginLeft = 0px. Need to add gap or margin between filter buttons.

ui_bugs.issue: Status filter tabs run together without spacing + 'Draft1' typo
ui_bugs.description: Status filter buttons run together without spacing. Also shows 'Draft1' instead of 'Draft' (possible data or label issue).
Transfer tab shows 'Tidak ada transfer' but empty state could be more prominent with icon + message.

passed_tests: FIX 1 VERIFIED: Duplicate page header removed on AdminHome (Control Tower) - page-title appears only ONCE
FIX 1 VERIFIED: Duplicate page header removed on SalesHome (Performa Saya) - page-title appears only ONCE
FIX 1 VERIFIED: Duplicate page header removed on ManagerDashboard - page-title appears only ONCE
FIX 3 VERIFIED: Login success notice auto-dismisses after ~5 seconds (not permanent)
Finance: Chart of Accounts loads correctly, no errors
Finance: General Ledger all 3 tabs present (Jurnal, Neraca Saldo, Buku Besar)
Finance: Trial Balance is BALANCED (Debit = Credit = Rp 92.056.750)
Finance: AR Aging loads correctly, shows AR Outstanding Rp 34.955.650
Finance: Kas & Bank loads correctly
Cross-page data consistency: AR Outstanding on Control Tower (Rp 34.955.650) matches AR Aging page total
POS/Sales Portal: Loads correctly with 84 products, search input, cart/keranjang visible, no errors
CRM: Loads correctly with 5 customer rows, Customer 360 panel opens successfully
Warehouse WMS: Stok tab loads correctly
Warehouse WMS: Inbound tab loads correctly with content visible
Warehouse WMS: Outbound tab loads correctly with content visible
Warehouse WMS: Cycle Count tab shows graceful empty state
Empty-data pages: Vendor Bills shows proper empty state with icon + message
Empty-data pages: RFQ shows graceful empty state
General UI/UX: No major console errors detected
General UI/UX: No broken images found
General UI/UX: No major text overflow issues

critical_fixes_required.issue: Status filter spacing on Returns & Special Orders pages
critical_fixes_required.description: Status filter buttons (Semua, Draft, Menunggu, Approved, Ditolak) are run together without spacing. Add gap or margin between buttons.
critical_fixes_required.fix_suggestion: Add gap-2 or space-x-2 class to the button container, or add margin to individual buttons

critical_fixes_required.description: FIX 2 INCOMPLETE: 'Semua Entitas' entity switcher appears 4 times instead of once. Should only appear in TopBar.
critical_fixes_required.fix_suggestion: Check AdminHome component for duplicate EntitySwitcher renders. Entity switcher should only be passed to TopBar via entitySwitcher prop.

minor_fixes.issue: WMS Transfer empty state could be more prominent
minor_fixes.description: Shows 'Tidak ada transfer' but could use icon + centered message for better UX
Check if this is a data issue or label issue in the status filter

verification_needed: After fixing status filter spacing, verify Returns and Special Orders pages show properly spaced filter buttons
After fixing entity switcher, verify AdminHome shows 'Semua Entitas' only ONCE (in TopBar)
Verify all fixes hold across different screen sizes (desktop, tablet, mobile)

success_percentage.finance_pages: 100% (all pages load correctly, Trial Balance balanced, AR consistent)
success_percentage.pos_crm: 100% (POS and CRM load correctly, Customer 360 works)
success_percentage.warehouse_wms: 90% (all tabs load, minor empty state improvement needed)
success_percentage.overall_frontend: 85% (2 critical bugs found, rest working well)

fix_1_duplicate_header.details: All 3 dashboards (AdminHome, SalesHome, ManagerDashboard) now show page-title only ONCE. The old in-card duplicate titles are gone, replaced by subtitles.

fix_2_entity_switcher.details: 'Semua Entitas' appears 4 times on AdminHome instead of once. Needs investigation and fix.

fix_3_login_notice.details: Login success notice 'Login berhasil sebagai [role]' auto-dismisses after ~5 seconds as expected.

finance_pages_audit.chart_of_accounts: Loads correctly, no errors, proper layout
finance_pages_audit.general_ledger: All 3 tabs (Jurnal, Neraca Saldo, Buku Besar) present and functional
finance_pages_audit.trial_balance: BALANCED - Total Debit = Total Kredit = Rp 92.056.750
finance_pages_audit.ar_aging: Loads correctly, shows AR Outstanding Rp 34.955.650 (matches Control Tower)
finance_pages_audit.data_consistency: AR Outstanding on Control Tower matches AR Aging page - CONSISTENT

returns_special_orders.returns_page: CRITICAL BUG - Status filter tabs run together without spacing
returns_special_orders.special_orders_page: CRITICAL BUG - Status filter tabs run together + 'Draft1' typo

warehouse_wms.transfer_tab: Working (minor: empty state could be more prominent)

empty_data_pages.vendor_bills: Proper empty state with icon + message
empty_data_pages.transfers: Empty state present but could be more prominent

notes.round_2_scope: This is Round 2 audit focusing on verifying recent fixes and auditing previously unreachable pages (Finance, POS, CRM, Returns, Special Orders, Warehouse WMS).
notes.navigation_pattern: Successfully used nav-group-toggle-<groupId> then nav-<itemId> pattern to access collapsed sidebar groups.
notes.data_seeded: DB contains 7 products, 5 customers, 9 sales orders, 11 purchase orders. Some collections intentionally empty (invoices, transfers, cycle count, rfqs, vendor bills) showing proper empty states.
notes.testing_approach: Frontend-only testing as requested. Used quick-login buttons with demo12345 password. Tested across admin, sales, manager, and warehouse roles.
notes.critical_finding: Status filter spacing bug on Returns & Special Orders is CRITICAL as it severely impacts UX - users cannot distinguish between filter options.
